title: ARC HTTP Request
description: Protocol-agnostic HTTP request model sent to the ARC sidecar for evaluation.

route_pattern.description: Matched route pattern (e.g., '/pets/{petId}'). Used for policy matching.

headers.description: Selected request headers relevant to policy evaluation. Must not include raw auth credential headers.

body_hash.description: SHA-256 hex hash of the request body. Null for bodyless requests.

body_length.description: Content-Length of the request body in bytes.

session_id.description: Session ID this request belongs to.

capability_id.description: Capability token ID presented with this request.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the request was received.
